command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== OpenClaw gateway running? ==="
systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null || systemctl is-active openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Find OpenClaw logs ==="
ls -la /home/jose/.openclaw/logs/ 2>/dev/null | tail -10

echo "=== Recent telegram activity in openclaw logs ==="
find /home/jose/.openclaw/logs -name "*.log" -newermt "-2 hours" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do
  echo "--- $f ---"
  grep -iE "telegram|polling|getUpdates|group|message" "$f" 2>/dev/null | tail -8
done

echo ""
echo "=== Is the telegram plugin/channel actually started? Check process ==="
ps aux | grep -iE "openclaw|telegram" | grep -v grep | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Check openclaw gateway log tail for telegram connection ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway -n 40 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|polling|channel|started|connect" | tail -10
REMOTE
